title: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haitian and Syrian immigrants
summary_full: The ruling opens the path for the Trump administration to deport hundreds of thousands of immigrants who have been living in the US for years.
summary_public: The ruling opens the path for the Trump administration to deport hundreds of thousands of immigrants who have been living in the US for years.
